# WCIEC Delhi - Study MBBS in Kyrgyzstan

WCIEC Delhi (West Coast Information & Education Consultant) is a premier educational consultancy specializing in direct MBBS/MD admission in Kyrgyzstan for Indian students. We provide comprehensive guidance, counseling, document processing, visa handling, and on-ground student support in Kyrgyzstan.

## Canonical Domain
All pages strictly enforce HTTPS, non-www, and trailing slashes.
- Canonical Host: `https://wciecdelhi.com`

---

## Core Offerings
- **Program**: Doctor of Medicine (MD Physician), equivalent to MBBS in India.
- **Duration**: 5 Years / 6 Years (including internship depending on the university).
- **Medium of Instruction**: 100% English Medium for international students.
- **Recognitions**: National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI), World Health Organization (WHO), FAIMER, ECFMG, WDOMS.
- **Facilities**: Separate boys and girls hostels, 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, and authentic Indian food cooked by Indian chefs.
- **Support**: In-campus FMGE/NExT licensing exam coaching by Indian doctors and educators.

---

## Website Structure & Key Pages

### Core Pages
- **Homepage (`https://wciecdelhi.com/`)**: Overview of MBBS in Kyrgyzstan, eligibility criteria, student benefits, and a quick consultation request form.
- **About Us (`https://wciecdelhi.com/about-us/`)**: WCIEC Delhi's history, core educational values, direct counselors, and information brochure.
- **Admission Process (`https://wciecdelhi.com/admission/`)**: Step-by-step guidance covering online application, document evaluation, university offer letters, visa processing, and departure check-lists.
- **Contact Us (`https://wciecdelhi.com/contact-us/`)**: Official Delhi office location, telephone numbers, emails, and direct callback registration form.
- **Legal (`https://wciecdelhi.com/legal/`)**: Standard terms of service, counseling agreement, privacy guidelines, and legal disclosures.
- **Universities (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/`)**: Comprehensive comparative directory of NMC-recognized medical universities in Kyrgyzstan.
- **MBBS Abroad (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad/`)**: Pillar guide for Indian students comparing MBBS abroad countries, admission, fees, eligibility, and visa support.
- **MBBS in Kyrgyzstan (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-kyrgyzstan/`)**: Primary country guide for affordable MBBS admission in Kyrgyzstan.
- **MBBS Abroad Consultants in Delhi (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-consultants-in-delhi/`)**: Local-service page for Delhi-based counselling and admissions.
- **Kyrgyzstan Medical Universities (`https://wciecdelhi.com/kyrgyzstan-medical-universities/`)**: Comparative university guide for Kyrgyzstan.
- **Blog (`https://wciecdelhi.com/blog/`)**: Education updates and MBBS abroad decision guides.
- **Search (`https://wciecdelhi.com/search/`)**: Internal search for WCIEC MBBS abroad guides, country pages, fees, NEET, NMC, visa, and hostel topics.

### Country Pages
- **MBBS in Russia (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-russia/`)**: Russia fees, eligibility, admission process, visa, hostel, and NMC checklist.
- **MBBS in Kazakhstan (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-kazakhstan/`)**: Kazakhstan fees, eligibility, universities, visa, and student-life guidance.
- **MBBS in Uzbekistan (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-uzbekistan/`)**: Uzbekistan MBBS admission, fees, NEET, NMC, and student support.
- **MBBS in Georgia (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-georgia/`)**: Georgia MBBS guide for Indian students comparing European-style options.
- **MBBS in Bangladesh (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-bangladesh/`)**: Bangladesh MBBS eligibility, fee planning, proximity, and admission support.
- **MBBS in Nepal (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-nepal/`)**: Nepal MBBS eligibility, entrance considerations, fees, and college comparison.
- **MBBS in Egypt (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-egypt/`)**: Egypt MBBS admission, eligibility, fees, visa, and NMC verification.
- **MBBS in China (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-in-china/`)**: China MBBS admission checks, English-medium verification, fees, and NEET guidance.

### Decision Guides
- **MBBS Admission 2026 (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-admission-2026/`)**: Admission timeline, eligibility, documents, NEET, and country shortlisting.
- **MBBS Fees Abroad (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-fees-abroad/`)**: Country-wise fee comparison, total-cost planning, and hidden-cost warnings.
- **MBBS Without Donation (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-without-donation/`)**: No-donation admission guidance and payment safety checks.
- **MBBS Admission Through NEET (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-admission-through-neet/`)**: NEET-qualified student pathway for MBBS abroad.
- **NMC Guidelines for MBBS Abroad (`https://wciecdelhi.com/nmc-guidelines-for-mbbs-abroad/`)**: NMC compliance checklist for foreign medical graduates.
- **FMGE/NExT Guide (`https://wciecdelhi.com/fmge-next-guide/`)**: Indian licensing exam pathway and university-selection signals.
- **MBBS Abroad Visa Process (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-visa-process/`)**: Visa documents, timeline, and pre-departure support.
- **MBBS Abroad Hostel Facilities (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-hostel-facilities/`)**: Hostel, Indian food, safety, Wi-Fi, and parent support.
- **MBBS Abroad Student Life (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-student-life/`)**: Student life, climate, safety, food, classes, and adaptation.
- **MBBS Abroad Scholarships (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-scholarships/`)**: Merit aid, discounts, scholarship documents, and verification.
- **MBBS Abroad Eligibility (`https://wciecdelhi.com/mbbs-abroad-eligibility/`)**: NEET, PCB marks, age, passport, and country-specific requirements.

### Medical Universities Details
- **Osh State University (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/osh-state-university/`)**: Established 1939. One of Kyrgyzstan's oldest and top-ranked government medical universities. Fully English-medium, massive clinical exposure, and comprehensive Indian hostel facilities.
- **Osh International Medical University (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/osh-international-medical-university/`)**: State-of-the-art infrastructure in Osh city. Popular for its advanced simulation laboratories, clinical rotations, and robust FMGE passing rates.
- **Jalal-Abad State University (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/jalal-abad-state-university/`)**: Established 1993. Renowned government institution with a 30-year legacy of medical training. Emphasizes clinical practice and student exchange programs.
- **Jalal-Abad International University (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/jalal-abad-international-university/`)**: Modern private medical university in Jalal-Abad. Features affordable packages, simulation-based training, and merit scholarships.
- **Central Asian International Medical University (`https://wciecdelhi.com/universities/central-asian-international-medical-university/`)**: Modern campus founded in 2016. Recognized for low tuition packages, advanced laboratory equipment, and strong student exchange programs.

---

## Admissions Information (2026 Session)

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Academic**: 10+2 with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB).
- **Entrance**: NEET-UG qualified scorecard (mandatory for Indian students to practice back in India).
- **Age**: Minimum 17 years of age by December 31st of the admission year.
- **Documents**: Valid passport (minimum 6 months validity), 10th & 12th marksheets, NEET scorecard, medical certificates, and passport photos.

### Contact Information
- **Delhi Office**: WCIEC Delhi Office
- **Phone**: +91 85868 73357, +91 99116 35435
- **Email**: wciec3182@gmail.com
